allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('version:', d.get\('version'\)\); print\('main:', d.get\('main'\)\); print\('exports keys:', list\(d.get\('exports', {}\).keys\(\)\)[:10]\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); import pprint; pprint.pprint\(d.get\('exports', {}\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('next version:', d.get\('version'\)\)")
